query: SELECT CONSTRAINT_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME, REFERENCED_COLUMN_NAME, DELETE_RULE FROM information_schema.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE kcu JOIN information_schema.REFERENTIAL_CONSTRAINTS rc ON kcu.CONSTRAINT_NAME = rc.CONSTRAINT_NAME AND kcu.TABLE_SCHEMA = rc.CONSTRAINT_SCHEMA WHERE kcu.TABLE_NAME = 'password_reset_tokens' AND kcu.REFERENCED_TABLE_NAME IS NOT NULL;
